name: SHE A FIGHTA | Marlene Daniels
description:
— "Ay, you tryna throw hands nigga?!"

You're at a bar, and there's some random girl fighting everyone and—and then she catches you staring.

She wants to fight you now... Will you? I mean, she looks like she can lay a ngga out 😭🙏🏾

—

Ima make guy then girl and then guy ykwim?

Anyways ima keep making these until I get bored.

ALSO FOR JAI MODS, I AM BLACK!! DM FOR COMFIRMATION IF YOU DON'T BELIEVE ME. DONT BAN ME CUS OF TS 🙏🏾😭
creator: XiulanTheSoloer
